summary: Tested Turkish documentation platform end-to-end. All 12 backend pytest tests passed (auth, sections, documents, search, CRUD, protected routes). Frontend E2E flows all working: homepage with hero+sidebar (11 seeded docs across 4 sections), /docs/giris content load with TOC, theme toggle (persists to localStorage 'theme' key), Cmd+K search dialog returns Turkish results for 'docker', admin login (good + bad password error 'E-posta veya şifre hatalı'), admin dashboard with seeded data, section creation, new document creation via Tiptap rich editor with redirect to /admin/edit/{id} and toast 'Doküman oluşturuldu', logout clears token, and protected /admin routes redirect to /admin/login when unauth. No blockers.

minor.issue: allow_origins=['*'] used with allow_credentials=False. Acceptable since JWT is in Authorization header (not cookies), but consider explicit origins for production.

issues: Console warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent (Radix a11y). Add DialogDescription or aria-describedby to suppress.

action_items: Optional: Add DialogDescription/aria-describedby to SearchDialog to remove Radix a11y console warning.
Optional: Tighten CORS allow_origins to specific frontend URL instead of '*' for production.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py uses deprecated FastAPI @app.on_event('startup'/'shutdown'); migrate to lifespan context manager (FastAPI >=0.93).
Seed-admin updates password only if it changes; good. bcrypt hash format verified ($2b$).
DELETE /api/sections/{sid} also deletes child documents — destructive without confirmation on backend (UI confirm exists, good).
Search endpoint uses regex over content — fine for small dataset; consider MongoDB text index for scale.
Frontend craco.config.js patch for webpack-dev-server v5 noted; works in this env.
seed_data_creation: No persistent seed needed. Test created/deleted TEST_UI_Bolum section and TEST_UI_Dok document; cleaned up via API after run.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend at REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL/api. JWT in localStorage key 'dokuman_token' as Bearer header. Theme persisted in localStorage 'theme'. Tiptap content area selector: .ProseMirror. Section select is a Radix button (not native <select>) — opens listbox with role='option'. All flows verified green; no follow-up required.
